summary: Made a surgical seam pass to clarify the post-D.C. time gap from Chapter 7 and to give the closing beat a slightly firmer sense of the block setting terms for Eli's place in Lena's life before Chapter 9's later consequences.
edits: Added an early 'A week after D.C.' time anchor near the opening to smooth the handoff from Chapter 7.
Trimmed a repeated 'week since D.C.' reference later in the scene to keep the continuity note from echoing.
Adjusted the final paragraph so the block's joking requests land with the weight of terms, strengthening the exit seam without changing events.
